next_step: Fix React hydration warnings + design Firestore audio tagging schema

last_push.commit_message:
feat: collapsible chat history panel + dynamic audio resolution

Adds a collapsible left panel listing previous chat sessions (rename,
delete, select), backed by a real multi-session Firestore model
(users/{uid}/chats/{chatId}) replacing the old single hardcoded
default chat doc.

Replaces the hardcoded 4-click audio map with a dynamic Storage-driven
lookup: lists training_audio/ once per session, parses each filename's
{number}-{slug}-{Nama phrase}.m4a convention into a phrase->URL cache,
and auto-detects bold/code Nama phrases in chat responses to attach
playable WaveSurfer cards — no more hallucinated-filename audio
failures, and no longer limited to just the 4 click sounds.

Includes a cleanup pass: extracted AudioWaveformPlayer as the single
reusable WaveSurfer widget (props: url, label), audioLibrary.ts
documented and confirmed as a true singleton cache, feature-flag
gating audited end to end with no regressions, no stray debug logs
or any types introduced. Logged in Master.md.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
